description: Pass the current tenant product code into the onboarding wizard from the MSP onboarding page.
Derive wizard step lists by product while preserving the full existing PSA step list.
Hide the Billing step for AlgaDesk tenants so setupBilling cannot be reached through wizard navigation.
Map displayed step positions to original step action indexes so product filtering does not call the wrong save/validation/render logic.
Keep AlgaDesk help-desk setup steps available and skippable where optional: team members, first client, client contact, and ticketing configuration.
Use AlgaDesk/help-desk-oriented title and description copy in the onboarding shell for AlgaDesk tenants.
Retain current onboarding completion and ticketing-default validation behavior for both PSA and AlgaDesk.
Keep existing onboarding_data merge behavior and user-specific field separation unchanged.
Add AlgaDesk onboarding wizard shell and step translation keys to all onboarding locale files.
